articles.title: About
articles.contents:
Contents
Purpose
Fine print

Purpose
The purpose of this site is to convey science, broadly conceived, to the community, broadly conceived.
Fine print
Unless collaborating with other authors, the views expressed here are my own, and do not necessarily represent the views of the institutions to which I belong.
My contact: joseph.bulbulia@vuw.ac.nz

            I’m a professor of psychology at Victoria University of Wellington. I work in the areas of cultural evolution, religion, longitudional research, psychological distress, rituals, and the good life. I like to run, play bass, and code.
            Her’s the fine print. The views expressed here are my own. Most of the work I present here has yet to undergo peer review. The views I present here do not necessarily represent the views of my collaborators or the institutions I serve.
            My contact: joseph.bulbulia@vuw.ac.nz
